resultsDisclaimer: *This is not a guarantee or promise of results.
legalSubscription: You will be automatically charged $19.99 after the payment confirmation. The subscription will then be auto-renewed every month after a 1-month intro offer at the full price of $49.99. To learn more, visit our
mobileAppHeading: Use Our Handy Mobile App to Improve Your Results
afterFinishNote: *after finishing you can start a new one
whyItWorksBody: According to your goals and personal data, our algorithm will craft a personalized walking plan to yield the best results. The app will set achievable daily activity goals and suggest a tailored walking workout program that will smoothly guide you to the target activity level for the first 4 weeks.
whatYouGetItem1: 300+ workouts & 500+ exercises from certified coaches with detailed video tutorials
whatYouGetItem2: 10-minute routines to fit into the busiest schedule
whatYouGetItem4: A variety of walking plans to try a new one every day
whatYouGetItem5: Fun. Drive. Health. To enjoy every minute of it!
storiesIntro: They’ve done it, so why can’t you? Here’s a few of our clients’ success stories.
faqWhatIsWalkingA: Walking is an app that offers you walking as a routine to keep you fit and lose weight if needed. A variety of plans adapted into 5–30 minutes walking workouts will get you into the true groove of your body.
faqPersonalProgramA: It's a plan tailored for you based on your goals and preferences. You can choose from 5–30 min workouts to fit into your calendar, as well as your level — from beginner to pro.
faqResultsQ: When will I see the results?
faqResultsA: Although it depends on many factors, you may start to see visible results within the first 28 days!
reviewGeorgeText: This is the best home workout plan! I can really feel the positive impact on my body, and it helps me release stress.
reviewCindyText: Easy and fun. Nice app for me as beginner. This is my new favorite routine!
reviewAidaText: I truly feel like they have a great impact on my physical body and it releases the stress.
securityBannerAlt: Secure SSL encryption. Powered by Stripe.
moneyBackBody: We are confident in the quality of our plan. We are even ready to return your money if you don’t see visible results and can demonstrate that you followed your plan. For more information, please read our
infoSafeBody: We won’t sell or rent your personal contact information for any marketing purposes whatsoever.
secureCheckoutBody: All information is encrypted and transmitted without risk using SSL.
storySophiaText: I used to hate workouts, now I walk every day and feel lighter, both in body and mind
storyLilyText: This app turned my walks into real progress. I’m seeing the difference on the scale and in my mood
